texto: What makes us brave isn't lacking the good sence to be afraid
autor: it's looking back at what we've lived through and seeing if we've faced it well.
explicacao: Citação de it's looking back at what we've lived through and seeing if we've faced it well. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “What makes us brave isn't lacking the good sence to be afraid” articula reflexao, caitlin-r-kiernan, makes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
